scripts.predev: npm run build:deps && npm run check:app
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm run build:app
scripts.check: npm run build:deps && npm run check:app
scripts.test:clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('./dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('./tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo', { force: true }); fs.rmSync('./coverage', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.test:prepare:app: npm run test:clean && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && node ./scripts/sync-package-imports.mjs dist-test
scripts.test:prepare: npm run build:deps && npm run test:prepare:app
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:prepare && npx --yes node@24 ../../node_modules/c8/bin/c8.js --check-coverage --statements 91 --branches 82 --functions 90 --lines 91 --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --reports-dir coverage/daemon --all --src src --exclude "src/**/*.test.ts" node --test "./dist-test/**/*.test.js"
